aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic foundation for AEO with structured content and schema markup, but lacks comprehensive optimization and engagement strategies.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build a strong Google Business Profile (GBP) presence.

gbp_analysis.summary: The business does not have an active Google Business Profile (GBP), which significantly impacts local search visibility.
critical_issues: No GBP listing found, leading to missed opportunities for local search traffic.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent or incomplete Name, Address, Phone (NAP) citations across directories, which can confuse search engines and customers.
action_items: Audit and update NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
Ensure NAP consistency on the website and social media profiles.
Claim and verify listings on major citation sites like Yelp, Bing, and industry-specific directories.
